purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.productCategory` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`BiologicallyDerivedProduct.productCategory` 0..1 `Coding`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.productCategory` 0..1 `Coding`
*  R4B: `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.productCategory` 0..1 `code`
*  R4: `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.productCategory` 0..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.productCategory` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.productCategory` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.productCategory` do not cover the following types: Coding.
The mappings for `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.productCategory` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: userSelected.
